ogTitle: Morts Estate vs Morundah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Morts Estate and Morundah.
heading: Morts Estate vs Morundah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Morts Estate, New South Wales and Morundah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Morts Estate and Morundah have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Morts Estate or Morundah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Morts Estate has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Morundah scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Morts Estate scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Morundah scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Morts Estate or Morundah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Morts Estate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
